summary: Tested Market Intelligence panel fixes: (1) Backend parallel yfinance fetching + stale-while-revalidate cache, (2) Frontend theme-aware MarketIntelPanel.jsx rewrite. All 14 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI works correctly in both dark and light modes. D/W/M toggles work for Brent and VIX. Cache hit confirmed < 500ms.
critical_code_review_comments: DRY violation in /app/backend/agents/market_intel.py: `_calc_vix_percentile` (lines 256 & 357) and `_next_expiry_info` (lines 265 & 366) are defined TWICE. Python uses the second definition (overrides first). Both are identical so no functional bug, but should be deduplicated to avoid confusion. Low priority fix.

test_results_detail.expiry_field: PASS - NIFTY and BANKNIFTY expiry countdown present
test_results_detail.light_mode_panel: PASS - background rgb(255,255,255), text rgb(15,23,42) - dark text on white bg
test_results_detail.brent_dwm_toggle: PASS - D shows (Day), W shows (Week), M shows (Month) change
test_results_detail.refresh_button: PASS - refresh button found, data persists after refresh (cache returns instantly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Market Intel panel fully working. Backend: parallel yfinance fetch (ThreadPoolExecutor 3 threads) + stale-while-revalidate cache (15min/30min TTL) confirmed fast. Frontend: theme-aware C object with isDark tokens working correctly in both dark (bg #0f1117) and light (bg white) modes. Access via: newspaper icon button (data-testid='news-btn') in top bar - NOT from Settings MARKET INTEL tab (that's a different component). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_market_intel.py
